description_long: This object consists of two cylindrical metal buckets, one green and one light blue, placed on a circular wooden platform. The green bucket stands upright with an open top, while the blue bucket is tipped over, revealing its beige interior. Both buckets have small, looped side handles for carrying, and their surfaces are smooth with a matte finish. The wooden platform beneath them is composed of weathered, light brown planks arranged in parallel, giving a rustic appearance. There are no visible labels, markings, or reinforcements on the buckets, and their interiors appear empty. The buckets are typical of those used for carrying water, paint, or other materials in urban or garden settings.
description: Two metal buckets, one green and one blue, with side handles, rest on a circular wooden plank platform. The green bucket stands upright while the blue bucket is tipped over, both with smooth, matte surfaces.
description_view_0: The green bucket is upright and fully visible, while the blue bucket is tipped over behind it, showing its open interior.
description_view_1: The green bucket is centered and upright, with the blue bucket tipped over to the right, exposing more of its interior.
description_view_2: The blue bucket dominates the view, tipped over with its open side facing forward, partially obscuring the green bucket behind.
description_view_3: The blue bucket is upright and closest, with the green bucket standing behind it, both clearly visible on the wooden platform.
